message:
Running command: DESIGN_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Final validation ==="
check() { [ -e "$1" ] && echo "  PASS: $(basename $1)" || echo "  FAIL: $1"; }

echo "-- verification/ --"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/verification/manifest.yaml"
echo "  scenario count: $(ls $DESIGN_ROOT/verification/scenarios/*.yaml 2>/dev/null | wc -l)"
echo ""
echo "-- Macro placement summary --"
echo "  macro.cfg entries: $(wc -l < $DESIGN_ROOT/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/macro.cfg)"
echo "  (should be 32 for 128KB SRAM)"
echo ""
echo "-- Die geometry from core.def --"
grep DIEAREA "$DESIGN_ROOT/def/core.def" | head -1
echo ""
echo "-- Padframe die geometry --"
grep DIEAREA "$DESIGN_ROOT/def/padframe.def" | head -1
echo ""
echo "-- GDS files --"
ls -lh "$DESIGN_ROOT/gds/"
echo ""
echo "-- Reports --"
ls "$DESIGN_ROOT/reports/"
echo ""
echo "-- Filelist --"
ls "$DESIGN_ROOT/filelists/"
